metadata.title:
LEGISLATORS L|N|NG Up TO


CHANGE LAWS on CONTEMPT

pages.raw_text:
SEATTLE-11 members Of legisla-
ture today, headed by Senator
Paulhamus, slated for president OF
the senate, added their names to
the already long list Of those who
will go to Olympia to fight the two
laws. Radical amendment of the
Injunction law and the repeal Of
the contempt law seems assured
today.

on his own contempt case" said

seem to have code of ethics all
their own. but l believe Judge
may err as we'll as a citizen"
